name: Verza TV
tagline: The Next Generation of Vertical Shorts
description: Verza TV is the first U.S. platform for premium short-form vertical entertainment. Founded by Alan Mruvka, the creator of E! Entertainment Television, Verza TV produces and distributes serialized micro dramas — story-driven vertical episodes built for mobile. It is a Filmology Labs company.
keyFacts: First U.S. platform dedicated to premium short-form vertical entertainment.
Specializes in serialized micro dramas produced in vertical 1080x1920 format.
Founded by Alan Mruvka, creator of E! Entertainment Television.
